text_orig:
WSJ: President Trump is considering a limited strike on the Iran regime to compel an end to nuclear enrichment.

Limited strikes at first. More force if the Iran regime does not comply.

Carriers and advanced aircraft are moving into position. 

A decision could come within 10 days.

This is no longer just talk. Military preparations are underway.
text_en:
WSJ: President Trump is considering a limited strike on the Iran regime to compel an end to nuclear enrichment.

Limited strikes at first. More force if the Iran regime does not comply.

Carriers and advanced aircraft are moving into position. 

A decision could come within 10 days.

This is no longer just talk. Military preparations are underway.
